metadata.name: Convert a Quote to a Sales Order

description: A customer has accepted a quote and wants to proceed with the order.

nodes.task_description: Find the existing quote using the quote number provided by the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the active quote in the system.

nodes.task_description: Use the 'Convert to Order' function to automatically create a sales order from the quote details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully converts the quote into a new sales order.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the new sales order number with the customer and send them an order acknowledgement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the SO number to the customer and emails the acknowledgement.
